reviews.review_description:
You guys should invite your friends and join the fun, the moderation team are very active and the game is so fun, there are so much things to do such as…

Forest

Horror

Ice land

Boxing

And more!!!

This game is SOO FUN! The game has a lot of game modes to offer and really nice and kind community and staff! This game should be one of the most famous considering the game was that good to make my lazy ahh actually leave a reveiw. The horror, cosmetics, game modes and collectibles are so well made! Whoever created this game, you are a W. I will play this game everyday. PLAY IT RN!

This game took me by surprise when I first got it. When I got to meet the community and staff I immediately fell in love. I liked the game so much that I joined their staff team and currently serve as the moderator named Lime. Overall, you should 100% download this game and tell your friends and other people too!
Bro the second day I played this game which is yesterday I met Jeppy and goof which are moderators and today I met the co owner😱😱😱😱😱But I’m confused on why they can’t talk?????

I am deeply invested in this game, in which I participate all the time. The game in itself and its great community, in-game and on Discord, come together to create an experience I can't find anywhere else, and that is what keeps me coming back day after day. Other than the fact that the gameplay itself is appealing and immersive, camaraderie and friendships forged with fellow players have made this game a part of my daily routine, consisting of; eating, sleeping, playing monkey's hangout, and then repeating it all over again. I have put a lot of time and energy into overcoming its challenges and discovering its diverse, ever-changing world.

I highly encourage others to download the game and join our Discord community to be a part of this amazing gaming experience. The support, tips, and shared enthusiasm within the community add so much more fun and make every session even more rewarding. Be it a seasoned player or a new one, the community is very friendly and always ready to help one get through.

If you ever get to find me in the game, just say hi; I am always open toward getting to know new players, sharing experiences and strategies, or simply enjoying the game. Let us really make something from this brilliant virtual adventure and fill our memory book to the fullest.
i love this game so much

This game is literally the game I play everyday. I don’t know what I would do without a game like this to always play on. The community is amazing in game and in the discord! I have truly dedicated a lot of my life to this game and it would be great if you download this game and joined the discord to support this amazing game! If you see me in game feel free to say hi and be a good monkey!
As soon as I got this game I could tell it was going to be amazing. It has so much gamemodes with a nice community. The graphics are good. This game is peak

Me personally, I think that this game is a great game and I think that everyone should download it. It has a bunch of fun mini games that range from jumping on these cool platforms in the sky, to a disco room, to a horror mode. I also think that the community is great and there isn't a lot of negativity and it's very welcoming. When I first got this game, I thought it would be like the hundreds of other monkey games that are not creative and lack-luster in a bunch of categories, but this game surprisingly well and I didn't see any glitches or failed textures. Anyways, I just think it is a good game and you should 100% download it.😊👍
The game is really cool because the mini-games are very well made its horror mod scares me more than other games and the community is great
Yo Cj YOU Worked So Hard Good Job
